summary: Frontend-only testing of the Hero section rebuild (iteration 3). Desktop screenshot confirms all major elements present and correctly ordered. Code review verifies mobile CSS. All spec requirements appear to be met.
critical_code_review_comments: PROOF array label says '5 Domains — Audit coverage' but the spec lists 6 domains in DOMAINS array. The proof strip shows '5' for Domains which is consistent with the array value — but the actual domain list has 6 items. Minor inconsistency but not a breaking bug, just worth noting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero section fully rebuilt per March 2026 spec. Desktop screenshot confirms: clean flat navy bg (no animations), eyebrow gold rule, white+gold headlines, bold body sentence, CTA row (gold primary + bordered secondary) ABOVE proof strip, proof strip 90/5/5 gold numbers, right panel with cost label, $10,000-$25,000+ coral figure, 'WHAT THE STANDARD INSTALLS' label, 6 domains. Mobile CSS media query at max-width:680px: proof-strip display:none, CTAs width:100%, hero-right flows below with border-top, headline 40px.

test_results.flat_navy_background: PASS - background #002244, no canvas/animation elements in code
test_results.eyebrow_gold_rule: PASS - visible in screenshot, code confirms gold rule + text
test_results.headline_line1_white: PASS - 'Your authority is active.' in white (#FFFFFF)
test_results.headline_line2_gold: PASS - 'Your exposure window just opened.' in gold (#C5A059)
test_results.bold_body_sentence: PASS - visible in screenshot with font-weight 500
test_results.cta_above_proof: PASS - CTA div (lines 118-182) appears before proof strip (lines 184-219) in DOM
test_results.secondary_cta_bordered: PASS - border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25), height 52px, data-testid='hero-secondary-cta'
test_results.proof_strip_numbers: PASS - 90/5/5 gold numbers visible in screenshot, below CTA row
test_results.right_panel_cost_label: PASS - 'THE COST OF BEING UNDERBUILT' visible in screenshot
test_results.standard_installs_label: PASS - 'WHAT THE STANDARD INSTALLS' visible in screenshot
test_results.6_domains: PASS - all 6 domains visible in screenshot
test_results.mobile_proof_hidden: PASS - CSS: .proof-strip { display: none !important } at max-width:680px
test_results.mobile_right_flows_below: PASS - CSS: grid-template-columns: 1fr !important, hero-right border-top set
